data.title: Planet Morning News
Mubarak surges over 150% after CZ posts on Binance Square
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted a message on Binance Square saying "I'm going to meet a friend this weekend" and attached a Mubarak-related Meme picture.
According to GMGN market data, after CZ posted the message, the price of Mubarak quickly rose by more than 150%, and its market value once exceeded 20 million US dollars. It is now reported at 18 million US dollars, and the 24-hour trading volume reached 27.1 million US dollars.

data.title: Chainlink unlocked 19 million LINK in five hours, and more than $205 million flowed into Binance
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain analyst @EmberCN, Chainlink completed its quarterly unlocking 5 hours ago, with a total of 19 million LINK (approximately US$262 million) transferred from two non-circulating supply addresses.
Among them, 14.875 million LINK (about US$205 million) were transferred directly to Binance, and 4.125 million LINK (about US$57.04 million) were transferred to a multi-signature address.
Key Stats:
Chainlink unlocks approximately 10 to 20 million LINK every three months, most of which flow into Binance, a small portion is transferred to multi-signature addresses, and some of which enter the LINK staking reward contract for issuing staking rewards.
Since 2022, approximately 163.65 million LINK (approximately US$1.81 billion) have been unlocked and flowed into Binance in this way, with an average transfer price of US$11.06.
Past data shows that despite the huge scale of LINK’s quarterly unlocking, its transfer to Binance did not have a significant impact on the short-term price trend of LINK.

data.title: Sacks and his VC firm sold over $200M in crypto and stocks before WH role
data.description:
David Sacks and his venture capital firm offloaded over $200 million in crypto and crypto-related stocks before he commenced his role as the White House AI and crypto czar on Jan. 20, according to a White House memorandum.“You and Craft Ventures have divested over $200 million of positions related to the digital asset industry, of which $85 million is directly attributable to you,” the March 5...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/david-sacks-sold-off-crypto-related-assets-prior-crypto-czar-white-house?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Hyperliquid's 50x leverage whale closed its LINK position at a loss of $1.27 million, and now shorted BTC at 40x leverage, with a liquidation price of $85,158
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain analyst @EmberCN, the Hyperliquid 50x leveraged whale that double-longed LINK in spot and contract yesterday has closed its position 4 hours ago, with an overall loss of $1.27 million.
The whale has now turned to BTC short positions, using 3.75 million USDC margin to open a 40x leveraged BTC short order on Hyperliquid, holding 1,937 BTC, with a total position value of $160 million, an opening price of $84,287, and a liquidation price of $85,158.
In addition, the whale's LINK trading yesterday was as follows:
LINK spot trading: purchased LINK worth 15.08 million USDC at an average price of $14.08, and finally sold it at $13.7, with a loss of $400,000;
LINK contract trading: opened long positions on Hyperliquid and GMX, using 3.18 million USDC, with a total loss of $860,000.

data.title: U.S. Senate Approves Republican Spending Bill, Averting Government Shutdown
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Senate has passed a Republican-proposed spending bill with a 62 to 38 vote, effectively eliminating the risk of a government shutdown. The legislation, which does not impose additional spending limits, supports the government streamlining plan led by Elon Musk and ensures government operations continue until the end of the fiscal year on September 30. The Senate will next review U.S. President Donald Trump's tax reform agenda, where Democrats are unable to use filibuster tactics to block the proceedings.

data.title: Fidelity's Bitcoin Fund Sees Inflow While Ethereum Fund Experiences Outflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that Fidelity's Bitcoin fund (FBTC) experienced a net inflow of $9.2 million yesterday, while the Ethereum fund (FETH) saw a net outflow of $11.6 million.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a 1.99% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 15, 2025, 00:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590 USDT, with a narrowed 1.99% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The U.S. Senate passed a spending bill, essentially eliminating the risk of a government shutdown
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Senate passed the Republican spending bill by 62 to 38 votes, basically eliminating the risk of a government shutdown. The bill does not set additional spending limits, allowing Elon Musk's government streamlining plan to advance and ensuring that the government operates until the end of the fiscal year on September 30.
In addition, the Senate will next review Trump's tax reform agenda, and the Democrats cannot use the filibuster procedure to check and balance on this issue. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Bitwise Strategist: MicroStrategy Stock Is the TradFi Equivalent of “Altcoins”
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitwise Chief Investment Strategist Ryan Rasmussen said in an interview that MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock's performance in the traditional financial (TradFi) market is similar to that of altcoins in the crypto market.
Rasmussen pointed out that MicroStrategy's stock price trend is highly correlated with Bitcoin, but with greater volatility, which is similar to the volatility of altcoins in the crypto market compared to Bitcoin. He emphasized that although MicroStrategy is classified as a technology stock or software company in the traditional market, it has essentially become a highly leveraged Bitcoin investment tool.
In addition, MicroStrategy's recently disclosed financial report shows that the total amount of Bitcoin it holds has exceeded 200,000, with a total value of approximately US$16 billion. The company continues to increase its holdings of Bitcoin through debt financing and convertible notes, making its stock one of the alternative investment targets for crypto assets. (The Block)
